title: elymus zhui
side_effects: Elymus zhui can have side effects if used improperly, such as allergic reactions, including hives, itching, and difficulty breathing in individuals with sensitive skin or respiratory issues. Excessive consumption of the plant's extracts may also cause stomach upset, nausea, and vomiting due to its high concentration of volatile oils. Furthermore, Elymus zhui may interact with certain medications, such as blood thinners, and exacerbate conditions like diabetes, high blood pressure, and epilepsy. In severe cases, improper use of the plant can lead to kidney damage, liver failure, and even cardiac arrest in susceptible individuals.
